title: GoC G9B evaluator artifact manifest
description: Index pointing to raw sheet, optional delta record, optional reconciliation. Evidence discipline is in those files, not this manifest.

evaluator_mode_declared.description: level_a_single_evaluator: only A scored. level_b_attempt_insufficient_independence: A and B matrices + delta present but independence evidence does not meet roadmap Level B. level_b_independent_evaluators: evidentiary independence satisfied.

evaluator_b_present.description: True when a separate Evaluator B raw matrix is committed for this audit_run_id.

closure_level_status_gate_g9b_reported.description: Mirror of g9b_level_b_attempt_record closure_level_status_gate_g9b_reported for manifest readers.

known_limitation.description: Optional human-readable limitation (e.g. single evaluator, incomplete Level B attempt).

description.description: Optional short summary of manifest purpose.

level_b_attempt_record_ref.description: Optional path to g9b_level_b_attempt_record.json for incomplete/failed/complete Level B attempts.

independence_declaration_ref.description: Optional path to human-readable independence declaration (markdown).

raw_score_sheet_ref.description: Path to g9b_raw_score_sheet evidence (Evaluator A / primary); retained for backward compatibility.

raw_score_sheet_evaluator_a_ref.description: Explicit path to Evaluator A raw score sheet.

raw_score_sheet_evaluator_b_ref.description: Path to Evaluator B raw score sheet; null when Level A or incomplete Level B.

score_delta_record_ref.description: Level B: path to delta record. Level A: null.

reconciliation_optional_ref.description: Optional; must not supplant raw or delta artifacts.
